subject: NEW VIDEO: Senator Perdue the Original Outsider
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/752a7650fd10/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66763?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**New Video: The Original Outsider**_
---
| Friends,

Senator Perdue – _he's the original outsider_. Long before he ran some of America's largest companies, he helped his family grow watermelons in Middle Georgia. He never wanted to be in politics. But six years ago, when our economy was a mess, he believed his experience turning around Reebok and Dollar General might help. Georgians agreed, and Republicans went on to build the greatest economic turnaround in American history. Now, we have to send Senator Perdue back to the United States Senate to help do it again.

Watch Team Perdue's latest video, which takes you from Senator Perdue's early days on the family farm to his life today: fighting to keep Georgians safe, healthy, and working.

---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=88dc24de3b&e=02cd889ad3 "The Original Outsider")

Hey Derek, Ellie Warner here, Terry's Finance Director. I'm taking a minute away from all the excitement of today's campaign launch to give an update on our founding donor goal. So, here’s the good news. After Terry made his announcement, the donations were pouring in. But as of right now, everything has just slowed to a trickle. I’m worried, Derek. We've made a lot of progress but with only hours until midnight, I'm getting nervous we could fall short of our very first goal. **I'm asking you directly to step up and chip in whatever you can now.****Here's a link to donate:****[secure.actblue.com/terry-for-virginia/launch-day-goal](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwZtUEYA5i2W6j9WsVMv7hMnxVUc4Wxka4hzvuI0Pt5L2XZO9wE6MwphU96gojYA4YwPE1MXUm1L9V7KG4OcRcYwefrwDxMrY5MufXZ2WQm4ZmoJI0vk6xNA_1y5cpEL2wxE_J2DPS-SBAEDVrU2fdvBbeMBkOvDLPFhWVRnFjCsOL_HR9GjMI1x-8sr-4Ty_Z1wl8hW5xmS8ZLacxyMtEfBiR51p7vQXB4uTnYxKWDZ1Ry_ieaBNFKWPKimV3y32k_k6cWNNOKNa7fpbF0aoQFikJXjwFwcT2CUhAXNtuM2ag/37l/O9k9GTgQSnmNQWohnZsbxA/h1/EnLj6N5vaBX_FC2NcCck3HFTtGDmjBk9SPaxQam4iZo) ** Hitting today's goal will set the tone for this campaign. Our grassroots effort is critical if we’re going to stand up to the Virginia Republicans trying to stop Terry’s bold agenda. I know Terry is watching what happens today closely and I know he'd be thrilled to know you were part of making our launch so successful. That's why I'm asking one last time: **[Will you chip in for the first time to our campaign and help us reach our donor goal of 2,500 before midnight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwayactHYO_2BPxZHpHZkDPg1WDp-RzxozbEhSB-J5gvXBVeVEc56jMkTs0rQ-Cz1dgZwiGstvZWWVaK9m6TDy7my1WWs2HrPMrVUCSLwWa5uSydG45pDRL1VsC7tHg4IQuaJPA5cQoV-JvysLmAfhNmpbsWbzEe3_Uicb9MxmUL8qK6PDrDDATdo5gW52WU9vnv4YYlwW1AdjUrgb0hi8c1gdRGXoDwl27jy5TdnJyVRf_hvu5DKTQnTfbJpNJJOzueOZJ9R4P_Vn6OC72GX5rgiVAhbt7WA2F30_8nW8KO0w/37l/O9k9GTgQSnmNQWohnZsbxA/h2/M2kqKdwaSJZuCFG9cZFHl9E7faEE3gXnfa9XdGegK0U)** More soon, Ellie Warner

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Repeating Obama's Mistake
body:
We mustn’t let this happen...
We mustn't let this happen... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juddkia-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Let's Not Repeat Obama's Mistake in Iraq](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-j/)
A further reduction of US troops in Iraq was recently announced. Is this a wise move? I think not, and here's why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Slaughter in Nigeria](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-d/)
It's happened again. The Islamist terror group Boko Haram has once again attacked innocent civilians in Nigeria. With the current COVID surge, the aftermath of the recent election and the upcoming holiday season, odds are you didn't see mention of this latest atrocity in most news coverage. In this week's blog, I discuss why this recent attack, or any terrorist threat, must not be ignored. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Losing Afghanistan?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-u/)
It was announced recently that US troop levels in Afghanistan will soon be reduced from 4500 to 2500. I am concerned that this is a mistake and in this week's blog I explain why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Suck It Up?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-n/)
Whoopi thinks conservatives like you and me just need to "suck it up." Here's what I think about that. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juddkia-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---

name: Team Kelly
subject: Join Kelly On Our Statewide Senate Firewall Tour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
Kelly Loeffler is kicking off her statewide Senate Firewall Tour - and she would love to see you there! You, your friends, and your family are all invited to attend. This will be a great, free opportunity to rally alongside Senator Loeffler (and special guests!) ahead of the January 5th runoff election!
Click on the links below to register for the first series of tour stops, and please share these events with friends and neighbors who might be interested in attending. If you have any questions about the event, feel free to email [caitlin@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:caitlin@kellyforsenate.com).
See you this weekend!
Team Kelly
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: PRO-LIFE LEADERS SLAM RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S SUPPORT FOR ABORTION ON-DEMAND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 10, 2020 PRO-LIFE LEADERS SLAM RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S SUPPORT FOR ABORTION-ON-DEMAND
ATLANTA - Radical Raphael Warnock is an extreme, far-left socialist who uses the gospel to justify his support for taxpayer-funded abortion-on-demand. He has been [described](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJskacJNTfZEpPb-sbVU9MwptXPH1kDGA8hJoic943rJW53oorUdY0_mQn00jBBFExCj4tqp5Euo3TubFdOdz8U_8LG7iQH036OJepeD7f1VvCaaCk-dJnO4QrDpG_sbDVgChMdBSwwKuGbneWh-spYCeOsJUP42O3gh7RQPUdmKpXb9A4DDsSDEEvD3SLZ1c2z&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) as an "activist preacher" who "opposes all abortion restrictions," and personally [considers](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJsbt3vxJQSPnP7AHgE1Xz6LlGQbHD0O2OpAEcUwZwPhVf5n9dTyv-Xh_vUqhaDEs3RgnZK8OhzJTCrVXG3OWTe0_cekw3RixtyX8ecP02RiNiEUrlybZ2K7XR5gdIkAupkt2jE5hm3V72MVZxdb2t973woqHa1h38Xcd3eYHjZo-JzYpFTxv9cCiwq3rGG3Cy1CJPq-e-NgDH4vNfUTaz2lbN1rC6U0it7bxzanorYq1SoMSe0EHyLhjzmDjARr6KhsHwweAta2Og=&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) abortion to be a "human right" that is " consistent with [his] view as a minister."
When Senator Loeffler directly asked Warnock about his support for abortion-on-demand at this week's debate, Warnock ardently [defended](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJsC9f_QZPfzp93uTYGxfwcPHf8GtCSnJ4BM2SBKHu-ICgLDkA8hDBThJ5Q814Y69Hz4isLlIExTbK5fcU7jrBvBCJjORsPzKct992Q5D4FS0xfm9mi6VAvqEZKePgk1841o9RKf9_zVnM9j0kHGlYGMDlURqsPuUy8uFCDoJHB7MKHW5wDqsWoVvfOyGY-rW-NmNK6kILX_sFtP2S-CFtTp_S6tDkQ9QJ7NMU01SIR6yg=&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) it, cementing his [long-standing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJs-RzwN3m2BTPRgTiyjdlqmA5wG-B4Zhu81n5uzm2tZVp-6nZYrTnV1hhXox1OcYu5xq0H91QMMup2ail0zK9w8tfFjnAT6jRO0zFrLpT6KN4TaF7cu_F3E5imO0Tr_oRDw3_Gpt-X1YKBQKIkcaKVG-q3r5Afh0jOM1ItHMoBiULN91KR_jHdCg==&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) opposition to the right to life. In response, Senator Loeffler [slammed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJs8PPTVh2lASDcYwnSCkp8qxMe3vTqxF8ILNRTcTLb0ZLnnY7aXUEojt0csh_4Y4wciv4_AXakbXDCey8SveaNovKkz5-yhyoe3zMUEu_xKvLvydjVBXQ8ddC3vB8MOGyC&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) Warnock for attempting to use the Bible to justify abortion. Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJs6mVKTdu2WcnI-JxGNCUP3Q7pneecv-g-u-EKlj2fbkCOEWqnUgbFn_7o_nXLMLkobXUwGRaQZ1H1HgmGvd6CG1N-HXINVgQzR8K0NPvsLUeypWC_2LOTV7LSaxa5jP2c8be9IPv7Xr6rSegKfOhxaoW51eKkOq7x5Kpip6V0QyGnivm6CVySdg==&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) or on the photo below to watch the exchange.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJs6mVKTdu2WcnI-JxGNCUP3Q7pneecv-g-u-EKlj2fbkCOEWqnUgbFn_7o_nXLMLkobXUwGRaQZ1H1HgmGvd6CG1N-HXINVgQzR8K0NPvsLUeypWC_2LOTV7LSaxa5jP2c8be9IPv7Xr6rSegKfOhxaoW51eKkOq7x5Kpip6V0QyGnivm6CVySdg==&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==)
---
| Read reactions from pro-life leaders below:
Marjorie Dannenfelser, Susan B. Anthony List: "Senator Kelly Loeffler has led the fight for compassionate, popular pro-life legislation that upholds the dignity of life and protects women. Her authentic pro-life, pro-woman leadership beautifully contrasts with the extremism of Raphael Warnock, a pro-abortion radical who distorts scripture to justify his support for abortion on demand, for any reason, through the moment of birth. Warnock is far out of the mainstream and wrong for Georgia."
Carol Tobias, National Right to Life: "Raphael Warnock is endorsed by Planned Parenthood, the biggest abortion chain in the country, responsible for the deaths of more than 345,000 unborn babies every year. Warnock made it clear in the debate that he would oppose any effort to protect unborn babies at any stage of pregnancy, and he believes Georgians should pay for abortion their tax dollars.
We need to return pro-life Senator Kelly Loeffler to the Senate so she can continue working with National Right to Life to protect defenseless unborn babies and their mothers from the tragedy of abortion."
Cole Muzio, Family Policy Alliance of Georgia: "As a 'pastor,' radical pro-abortion Raphael Warnock continues to deny the great commandment to love thy neighbor. Contrary to his stated faith, Warnock's extremist views align with the political fringe: believing those that the psalmist declares were knit together in their mother's womb can have their beating hearts silenced up to and even after birth. In her short time in the Senate, Kelly Loeffler has distinguished herself as the most ardent defender of the right to life, cherishing all life from conception to natural death. Radical Raphael Warnock marches in with lockstep with his Party's uniform opposition to the Born Alive Bill, and his ideology is aligned with racist extremist Margaret Sanger rather than the Gospel he falsely claims to preach. We cannot, as a culture, afford to shift from someone who will fight for all life to someone who has proven so hostile to the science, logic, and faith that inform our increasingly pro-life culture."
Joshua Edmonds, Georgia Life Alliance Action: "Mr. Warnock's support for the disproportionate slaughter of African-American babies is beyond disturbing. While the Black community only represents 32% of the state's population, they shockingly represent 69% of all abortions statewide. For every 1,000 Black babies born alive in Georgia in 2019, 413 Black babies were tragically murdered at the hands of abortionists with the consent of Raphael Warnock. For the pastor of the spiritual home of Martin Luther King, Jr. to callously lead his sheep to the slaughter is an affront to the Gospel in every conceivable way. If Mr. Warnock believes what the Bible says about all life being created and ordained by God, and if science undeniably tells us that the human lifespan begins at the moment of fertilization, it should be impossible for him to arrive at any position other than that innocent babies should be protected by law. No one has done more in Washington to build a culture of life than Senator Kelly Loeffler. We are thankful for her pro-life leadership and look forward to continuing to partner with her to protect both the right to life and the right to live."
While Warnock has been endorsed and bankrolled by [Planned Parenthood](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJsi0abFAX4EyMB604xK6WbfsLj2wQ1o_OTLe_KvWMaxF0cHKnjJQRHjRFKAe0FEOfQwbJ9S5qaH-1NWjJR1tOTG3naTZ8xKTd_BoftskbM2hW5dYo9KUfZUEeCJ250HS1MLyMb2YK8ma-W8d6DozNDFOVEbRq36zdpM8x9c_o8cxYsghAY4mV_aLJedxsFl9FBj49Xtxoxw1LTF1pD9Q_zz4ZEDx9l12sW97SFX1cxZWEFIaEu-mzBXVDUeYcH7k8p5zaSaw0j-4zctBUUOVNebvuMuLagSYHTrMg3PW1YsTT2axoS-v2gjG8vPBJU2zrFE4XyoqTPJFI=&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) and [NARAL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPr-eVl4bnWJssMrtBp8awXOFIcafBXm4BKSys-wdBMFqj1eOSgvaIYqdm23DD5Nbu4ASLKTeDDxIkTbbJLgOpoTtB-GlKmaHXn0HCg687Ty-Ut28GLg4etbsrcj5Vg-O2NWOKR9Jrai8FrKEkDfzOLWlngDqlsucUDr7Bew79UZhY8ii3DsbXqlEK282y0KDjYTwKlMTY3ybdsNkP33O8oulAKJQXtvrig==&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) - two extremist groups notorious for their support of unlimited abortion-on-demand - Senator Loeffler is 100% pro-life, and has the [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VbjKW6Tba1z53NwvomHKGhUVR8olokIna-i80Z3gD_s1dEBznKJPtJZgnZ4u2Gvnz9ifxiyzpkBR6DfZQjSZ93-FQUlSvB3G5BiU8mwR3ML8Y4WL_jRDN4tnpGen3P8VogkJ-87d1-gCmb4FayBysnKFYv8A1A4hKjq_UK8eTs=&c=o2PeAXFGQtJeK9eRV8hMo_3zIt8FP8VybtUf2P6S7-1ELQkx1k074g==&ch=YZkPNwtkv3A7A9zKKLqCxAt8yYotfN8_XKywICY8kq5RPKKOsl1ZRQ==) of every major pro-life group in the nation - including those listed above.
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com)

Radical Raphael Warnock marches in with lockstep with his Party's uniform opposition to the Born Alive Bill, and his ideology is aligned with racist extremist Margaret Sanger rather than the Gospel he falsely claims to preach. We cannot, as a culture, afford to shift from someone who will fight for all life to someone who has proven so hostile to the science, logic, and faith that inform our increasingly pro-life culture." Joshua Edmonds, Georgia Life Alliance Action: "Mr. Warnock's support for the disproportionate slaughter of African-American babies is beyond disturbing. While the Black community only represents 32% of the state's population, they shockingly represent 69% of all abortions statewide. For every 1,000 Black babies born alive in Georgia in 2019, 413 Black babies were tragically murdered at the hands of abortionists with the consent of Raphael Warnock. For the pastor of the spiritual home of Martin Luther King, Jr. to callously lead his sheep to the slaughter is an affront to the Gospel in every conceivable way. If Mr. Warnock believes what the Bible says about all life being created and ordained by God, and if science undeniably tells us that the human lifespan begins at the moment of fertilization, it should be impossible for him to arrive at any position other than that innocent babies should be protected by law. No one has done more in Washington to build a culture of life than Senator Kelly Loeffler. We are thankful for her pro-life leadership and look forward to continuing to partner with her to protect both the right to life and the right to live." While Warnock has been endorsed and bankrolled by == and == - two extremist groups notorious for their support of unlimited abortion-on-demand - Senator Loeffler is 100% pro-life, and has the == of every major pro-life group in the nation - including those listed above. | ### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com powered by

body:
Defending Wisconsin values! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,When I ran for Congress, I promised you that I would fight to**change Washington**... and that **Washington wouldn't change me**.This past month has been a reminder of just what we're fighting for... [Help Change Washington - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Help Change Washington - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Help Change Washington - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Last month, I traveled to Washington as part of the orientation program for new members. What I got was a firsthand reminder of the _entitlement_ , the _egos_ , the _swamp mentality_... [**and why so many of us are fighting to FIX Washington!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Then, I got to compare that with my time here in Wisconsin. Hunting in the woods with my son. Keeping tradition alive with my family. Supporting local small businesses on Main Street.We've got it right here in the real world. That's the perspective - and the _**fight**_ - I'm bringing to Washington. -Scott Fitzgerald [Join The Fight!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xklirhy-ahkdjtlkr-d/)

name: Mike Siegel
subject: Election debrief with Texas progressives — tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
Join me, Julie Oliver, Cristina Tzintzun Ramirez, and other progressive Texas candidates to discuss the 2020 election results and the path forward. Event will be broadcast on Zoom and social media.

|
---

| | Dear friends, Tonight I'll be joined by a great group of Texas candidates to discuss the 2020 election results and what needs to be done to win the next time. We'd love for you to join us. **What** : "Towards a Progressive Texas: Election Debrief and the Path Forward" **When** : Today, December 12, 2020, 7:30-8:30pm Central **Who** : Progressive Texas Candidates for State and Federal Office **How** : [Click here to register for the Zoom event (limited space)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22421963/264374053/-1842810538?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU2YWE3OS0wYzNiLWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2wTY1VjeG6tEwgxBh6CGeCxhSbE0S-GwMvMiz0ayJc=&emci=5aa76a84-073b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=9e56aa79-0c3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=6233172) and on [my Twitter feed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22421965/264374055/1611319176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU2YWE3OS0wYzNiLWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2wTY1VjeG6tEwgxBh6CGeCxhSbE0S-GwMvMiz0ayJc=&emci=5aa76a84-073b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=9e56aa79-0c3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=6233172). The panel includes **Cristina Tzintzun Ramirez** , candidate for U.S. Senate; **Julie Oliver** , who ran for the U.S. House in TX-25; and three state office candidates, **Clayton Tucker** , **Akilah Bacy** , and **Lorenzo Sanchez**. Key topics include: (1) the messages we ran on and how we can communicate better; (2) the results (including how progressive Democrats performed as well, if not better, than moderates); and (3) our thoughts on how to build a progressive Texas future. Hope to see you there!

Mike

body:

right around the corner and the fate of the Nation hangs in the
balance.

The Georgia Runoff Election
is right around the corner and the fate of the Nation hangs in
the balance. So much is at stake and I need to know that you are
on our team and ready to FIGHT for America.

CONTRIBUTE NOW

The President is barnstorming
the State of Georgia to turn out the vote for Senators Kelly

Our Country is counting on

DESTROYED.

Since joining the Republican Party, Congressman Van Drew has fought against the Radical Left agenda of the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and Defunding the Police. He has fought to defend President Trump, secure our borders, protect our men and women in uniform, and help the hard working middle-class families of South Jersey. **Jeff Van Drew is fighting for a Strong America and a Strong South Jersey!**

And the truth is that the Democrats are trying to actively STEAL this election from President Trump and his supporters. We need every patriot possible to stand up and fight back against their attempts to subvert our Republic. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I9v9b7tzsCq0_y-ex4a7Zyy4lV-pobaAUCfiAWThETFuLyf6mnx003dK0l-Fc_sDW6BWiqummu3-fqCCYsRVlmdbkI4fQM7OlLQbVoGMkom2HoAf_-YU4bOeKzOdHbNA75x2K3bkO_U=&c=ARTisB5NhrFqqpE3UdqYZ_ouJBo12F9pK45hv-lD35tqRkIX27wMyg==&ch=xVrv4fual1-8HDweurdonqJllRNimcLRxw5beUFanMWhcTpBvP51qw==).

It's that pride that has me so emotional and passionate about Kelly Loeffler's race in Georgia.

Her opponent, Raphael Warnock, has a deeply troubling past riddled with communist ties and socialist ideals. As a Cuban American I take a past like Warnock's to be incredibly troublesome and should worry every American in our country.

I don't want to see American go down the same path that has destroyed so many other countries in the past. [**Please, pitch in to Kelly Loeffler RIGHT NOW and help us fend off the attacks from the radical Left. clean_body: Friend, I was recently reflecting on my trip down to Georgia and what an amazing experience it was. The grassroots support I saw amplified my pride in being a Conservative. It's that pride that has me so emotional and passionate about Kelly Loeffler's race in Georgia. Her opponent, Raphael Warnock, has a deeply troubling past riddled with communist ties and socialist ideals. As a Cuban American I take a past like Warnock's to be incredibly troublesome and should worry every American in our country. == We continue to see radical, self-proclaimed socialists entering the Democratic Party and it reminds me all too well of the start of socialism that has ravaged through Cuba and Latin American countries. I don't want to see American go down the same path that has destroyed so many other countries in the past. == A collapse like what we've seen in Cuba and Venezuela cannot happen here. Will you stand with us to fight back against these communist candidates today? The fate of our country relies on support from Conservatives like you. == == == == == We can't continue to allow these radical socialist candidates to enter our government. It started with people like Bernie Sanders and AOC, and needs to end with candidates like Raphael Warnock. == Thank you, Senator Marco Rubio == Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 10, 2020
NEW ADS EXPOSE RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S HISTORY OF RADICAL, ANTI-ISRAEL RHETORIC
ATLANTA - Today, the Loeffler campaign released two new ads, "[Birds of Prey](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JnX7e_nlRoKUpf_3VrhpJsMx3KXM-2s8ETw1qM1MY9VsLGbcNKR2SkBVcbtsBqs5fDrkT8zuKEQZik23OUrnkAiERmBnkWNYW3c46ivPKzdnm3WCqfFXGW5HpSmEDoQEaWPjC-0ji-t7Gbnwa5NIhDdvaqUCaB6oWmNmTKhW0RfwV5juImrJPOc2T9zJ94-YbSvK6LpkRkg=&c=AAlHBlcTnc0vALW8mvyCipe82F4Z4KKmJyaFxOpzAvEy6RcV-Ef2Pg==&ch=UopZkCE27iGC_Pu5HRtb3yE0n9DYNqewbPHEa4r_Mq_rslXhPGOozA==)" and "[Terror](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JnX7e_nlRoKUpf_3VrhpJsMx3KXM-2s8ETw1qM1MY9VsLGbcNKR2SkBVcbtsBqs5lDfG2SZ6YGgPZGg4ZZIZqJQYnXVdU4D4nYRKWMhyxxvtoSBOGVlIqXYj4N49dIAuTnGLU4gDLbmjdrdjwTaKvqUX5IDdSTwucC-nFJD-l03hFh4_aDhP8KBepYeFX68jcPthsgOotLM=&c=AAlHBlcTnc0vALW8mvyCipe82F4Z4KKmJyaFxOpzAvEy6RcV-Ef2Pg==&ch=UopZkCE27iGC_Pu5HRtb3yE0n9DYNqewbPHEa4r_Mq_rslXhPGOozA==)," exposing radical Raphael Warnock for his long history of anti-Israel rhetoric. Warnock has [called](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JnX7e_nlRoKUpf_3VrhpJsMx3KXM-2s8ETw1qM1MY9VsLGbcNKR2SlBPdCY9a37KixHDXDwz8R_r_lmU2VbqIkQ3ujIpShrz_OV_PXZXmXYsX5g4oqkl1ghaqe_FD0DPC0y8oWWZOIybmmxl4e_EG_L45cUMYZZIiAOl2FCJwazbUi0obd12ffVV7LV2YtVq5-U-VYPNPEQVqCYqGuUrkLdoYOcIbtISaJGBU0UJ7vlSNOnAyujNj6ZzCvI4wN9LN11wpQVMVxk=&c=AAlHBlcTnc0vALW8mvyCipe82F4Z4KKmJyaFxOpzAvEy6RcV-Ef2Pg==&ch=UopZkCE27iGC_Pu5HRtb3yE0n9DYNqewbPHEa4r_Mq_rslXhPGOozA==) Israel an "apartheid state," [accused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JnX7e_nlRoKUpf_3VrhpJsMx3KXM-2s8ETw1qM1MY9VsLGbcNKR2Sp8w2JeF5U44P2A6hp-jBNLRt4tPpQK_I17bIPeFAHQVXs4kLZe5cIvQZg0ms_1Un-q32NDGxkl0rygB1xIRWJZ9z5l1-DhgKerJfA03YEZg_UsQCRsNqinc4RdeADjE7eTnPQ515qFYeVb2xe8-vUuq0aqofmupcsQYX8Gc-m_CqgzGUlAQNfYISMejdxHakz-vQQd4TWNa&c=AAlHBlcTnc0vALW8mvyCipe82F4Z4KKmJyaFxOpzAvEy6RcV-Ef2Pg==&ch=UopZkCE27iGC_Pu5HRtb3yE0n9DYNqewbPHEa4r_Mq_rslXhPGOozA==) Israelis of shooting Palestinians like "birds of prey," and said America's human rights record is worse than China and Iran.
To view "[Birds of Prey](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JnX7e_nlRoKUpf_3VrhpJsMx3KXM-2s8ETw1qM1MY9VsLGbcNKR2SkBVcbtsBqs5fDrkT8zuKEQZik23OUrnkAiERmBnkWNYW3c46ivPKzdnm3WCqfFXGW5HpSmEDoQEaWPjC-0ji-t7Gbnwa5NIhDdvaqUCaB6oWmNmTKhW0RfwV5juImrJPOc2T9zJ94-YbSvK6LpkRkg=&c=AAlHBlcTnc0vALW8mvyCipe82F4Z4KKmJyaFxOpzAvEy6RcV-Ef2Pg==&ch=UopZkCE27iGC_Pu5HRtb3yE0n9DYNqewbPHEa4r_Mq_rslXhPGOozA==)," click the photo below:

subject: Bill Lee did WHAT?!

Peter,
In the midst of the worst wave of this pandemic, Bill Lee does nothing. As Tennessee amasses over 400,00 cases, and 5,000 deaths, Bill Lee does nothing. Every day, as Tennessee sets new daily records of COVID cases and the White House has recommended a statewide mask mandate, Bill Lee does nothing.
Tennessee has access to MILLIONS of federal dollars - TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families) – that could help ease the financial burden so many hardworking families are facing right now. The only thing this money can be used for is to help and Bill Lee does nothing.
For the month of December, an amazing group of donors has committed to a 100% match on all donations up to $20,000. We must maximize this opportunity so we have the resources to take on Bill Lee and the Tennessee Republican Party. Bill Lee needs to go.
Will you help us double your investment by making a donation today? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: You Pay for Governor Walz' Shutdown
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Legislators are meeting behind closed doors right now, crafting a bill to bail out Tim Walz' Shutdown. And YOU are going to be responsible for the check.** As you well know, Governor Walz' illegal and unconstitutional order is devastating our economy and harming the health and physical wellbeing of Minnesotans. His executive order carries stiff penalties for violators including jail time. But courageous people like **Larvita McFarquhar** are not going to allow Walz' tyrannical dictates shut them down. Facing massive fines and imprisonment, [Larvita stood up to Walz](https://www.action4liberty.com/larvita_on_fox_news?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=2) and reopened her restaurant Havens Garden in Lynd, MN.
### Larvita's bravery has inspired others as well!
Last night, another patriot opened up her restaurant in East Grand Forks. Her name is [Jane Moss and her Boardwalk Bar & Grill](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnQSf4UD6mN62aoi0s7mkYRg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=3) offered community members a welcoming place to come enjoy a meal and drink during these difficult times. But according to Governor Walz and his small business hit squad at the MN Department of Health, Jane was irresponsibly endangering Minnesotans by opening back. Of course, packed big box retail stores like Wal-Mart are wide open. I guess there's magical powers at work there.
## Who are they trying to fool?!
I'm beginning to think there's something much larger at play here. The same elites and political class that have been trying to reset our economy to stop "global warming" are the ones who are destroying small business in the name of stopping the spread of COVID. But patriots across this state are rising up and saying no to this clear cut assault on capitalism and our Republic. So why won't our legislature do what's right and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all??? We stand with patriots like Larvita and Jane; will our elected legislators stand with them as well? **Governor Walz just extended his Emergency Powers for another 30 days and has called our legislature back to the Capitol on Monday. We've received no assurance that the Republican Senate will vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers, but they've been spending plenty of time crafting a bill behind closed doors to bail out Walz' shutdown.** They are rewarding Governor Walz by making YOU pay for the bailout. This is Socialism 101: government takes control of private industry, then redistributes the wealth. We SHOULD be opening businesses back up instead. We need you to contact your state senator and representative now and tell them to pass the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution on Monday. One person should not be creating laws in our state. It's time for the legislature to do what's right and end this shutdown. **Please contact your legislator ASAP!****** Remember, these politicians work for YOU. Their job is to protect liberty, not take it away. But their instinct up at the Capitol is to grow government at the mercy or our liberties. That's why it's extremely important for all of us to contact our legislators about Walz' abusive powers. If everyone who received this email contacts their senator and representative, the politicians will start to buckle. It will become politically dangerous for them to vote the wrong way.
## **And that's how we win!**
Sample Script: The Governor's illegal and unconstitutional orders are devastating to our economy. Everyday, small businesses are being shutdown while big box retailers are wide open. Places like Wisconsin and North Dakota are getting tons of business from Minnesotans who want to feel normal again and go out to eat. And I fear for the mental and physical wellbeing of our youth when fitness clubs and sports are shutdown. It's time for you to do what's right for Minnesota and stop Walz' unilateral rules. I've heard about the "relief bill" being crafted behind closed doors. Don't make us pay for the Governor's shutdown. Open Minnesota back up. Vote YES on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution on Monday.
## [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=4)[CONTACT MY SENATOR AND REP](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=5)
**Don't want to make the call or send the email, you can help us get our message out to more Minnesotans with a[contribution](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=6). [$100, $50 or even $25 goes a long way to building our army](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=7) of Minnesotans who will stand up against Tyrant Walz.** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_shutdown_bailou&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Did you hear about Nancy Pelosi’s BIG fundraiser?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
**Pelosi to headline fundraiser for Georgia Senate runoff**

You read that correctly, Speaker Nancy Pelosi is ALL IN to win in Georgia and STEAL the Senate Majority.

Pelosi knows that if Democrats win both seats in Georgia, there will be nothing stopping her radical agenda. She will be able to implement the radical Green New Deal, raise taxes, restrict our Second Amendment Rights and eliminate school choice.

Friend, I know you care deeply about our country and [**I am counting on you to chip in $10, $25, $50 or even $100 to fight back against Nancy Pelosi and her attempts to steal the Senate Majority.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-pelosi-in-georgia-election/?utm_campaign=20201210_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1042930-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201210_did-you-hear-about-nancy-pelosis-big-fundraiser/)
[Stop Pelosi](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-pelosi-in-georgia-election/?utm_campaign=20201210_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1042930-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201210_did-you-hear-about-nancy-pelosis-big-fundraiser/)

subject: What are your top priorities?

body:
|

| | Peter,

In just over a month, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States, and with his help, I know we will continue to progress as a Nation. However, we still have a lot to do. I want to hear directly from you on what your top issues are and what you think this new administration should prioritize.

**Will you take a moment to fill out our Priorities Survey as we come into the new year? Come January 20th, we are going to hit the ground running!**

clean_body: | | | Peter, In just over a month, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States, and with his help, I know we will continue to progress as a Nation. However, we still have a lot to do. I want to hear directly from you on what your top issues are and what you think this new administration should prioritize. Will you take a moment to fill out our Priorities Survey as we come into the new year? Come January 20th, we are going to hit the ground running! My colleagues and I are excited to begin our work with President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris. There has never been a more important time for us to course-correct our politics, and the secret ingredient to making that lasting change is Thank you for your continued support, Mike Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

subject: Senator Perdue Joined Shannon Bream, Austin Rhodes & Greg Kelly from the Bus Tour!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9acc22dc6b69/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66795?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**In the News**

**Senator Perdue Joined Shannon Bream, Austin Rhodes & Greg Kelly from the Bus Tour!**_
---
| Folks,

Yesterday was another AWESOME day on the Win Georgia, Save America Bus Tour!

We made stops in Habersham, Stephens, Hart, Lincoln, McDuffie, and Columbia Counties, and made some time to join the Austin Rhodes Show, Newsmax's Greg Kelly Reports, and Fox News at Night with Shannon Bream from the tour bus.

_**Click the picture below to hear Sonny Perdue joined David as a surprise guest on the Austin Rhodes Show.**_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a050d5698d&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| _**Fox News at Night with Shannon Bream**_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2730e761a4&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
_**Greg Kelly Reports on Newsmax**_
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d61870cb5d&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| _**Senator Perdue is the original outsider.**_

Long before he ran some of America's largest companies, he helped his family grow watermelons in Middle Georgia. He never wanted to be in politics. But six years ago, when our economy was a mess, he believed his experience turning around Reebok and Dollar General might help. Georgians agreed, and Republicans went on to build the greatest economic turnaround in American history. Now, we have to send Senator Perdue back to the United States Senate to help do it again.

Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bea00f2c40&e=02cd889ad3) to watch Team Perdue's latest video, which takes you from Senator Perdue's early days on the family farm to his life today: fighting to keep Georgians safe, healthy, and working.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e80e3b6f84&e=02cd889ad3 "The Original Outsider")
---
| Facebook is still banning ads, so we need your help to share Senator Perdue's message.
_Click __[_here_](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0a497db5e8&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet.
Click [_here_](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b45c16b4ab&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook._
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=4d6b7a0a03&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2a72fcac1c&e=02cd889ad3 "VOLUNTEER")

body:
Join me, Julie Oliver, Cristina Tzintzun Ramirez, and other progressive Texas candidates to discuss the 2020 election results and the path forward. Event will be broadcast on Zoom and social media.

|
---

| | Hi all! In case you missed it, this event starts in just a few hours! Hope to see you there. — Mike ************************************************* Dear friends, Tonight I'll be joined by a great group of Texas candidates to discuss the 2020 election results and what needs to be done to win the next time. We'd love for you to join us. **What** : "Towards a Progressive Texas: Election Debrief and the Path Forward" **When** : Today, **December 10, 2020** , 7:30-8:30pm Central **Who** : Progressive Texas Candidates for State and Federal Office **How** : [Click here to register for the Zoom event (limited space)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22429356/264403374/-1842810538?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNlNTU2Yi0yZjNiLWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQuW5EZB2XkYNDZMlseFomwKsfZHX9quhI1Mu4MDNVo=&emci=f80f82d9-2e3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=59ce556b-2f3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=6233172) and on [my Twitter feed](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/22429358/264403376/1611319176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNlNTU2Yi0yZjNiLWViMTEtOWZiNC0wMDE1NWQ0M2IyY2QiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQuW5EZB2XkYNDZMlseFomwKsfZHX9quhI1Mu4MDNVo=&emci=f80f82d9-2e3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&emdi=59ce556b-2f3b-eb11-9fb4-00155d43b2cd&ceid=6233172). The panel includes **Cristina Tzintzun Ramirez** , candidate for U.S. Senate; **Julie Oliver** , who ran for the U.S. House in TX-25; and three state office candidates, **Clayton Tucker** , **Akilah Bacy** , and **Lorenzo Sanchez**. Key topics include: (1) the messages we ran on and how we can communicate better; (2) the results (including how progressive Democrats performed as well, if not better, than moderates); and (3) our thoughts on how to build a progressive Texas future. Hope to see you there!

Mike

Derek,
**Yesterday I announced that I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia and I wanted to tell you why.**
When Virginians helped elect Joe Biden as our next President, we didn’t just fire Donald Trump, we fired Betsy DeVos, the worst Secretary of Education in our nation’s history.
It’s a huge step forward, but even after Trump and DeVos, we’ve still got a lot of work to do to repair Virginia’s broken education system.
Did you know Virginia is 50th out of 50 states in teacher pay compared to average pay? **We’re dead last behind every state.**
It’s wrong. It’s way past time to think big, be bold, and invest in our kids and our schools.
That’s why I’m proposing the largest investment in our students, schools and educators in Virginia’s history. As governor, I will dramatically raise teacher pay and address the racial disparities in our education system.
Our educators of Virginia are the lifeline for our children's future and deserve to be treated as such.
**So it’s time to go big and I need your help. Will you add your name and co-sponsor my plan to make the biggest investment in education in Virginia’s history?**
The link between education, jobs, and rising incomes is basic economics. If you don’t have access to good schools, quality educators, and a system that’s as diverse as our Commonwealth, you won’t get the education you need to succeed.
It’s just common sense.
With your help, we can create good 21st Century jobs and build a future that lifts up Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth.
**These aren't pie in the sky ideas -- my plan can and will put the Commonwealth on the right track to providing access to an equitable, world-class education for all Virginia children.****[If you're ready to change our state's education system for the better, add your name now →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuzCI9ATzRRtHGCuyXBcLWMtm7jMSNyrkzSt25LzdH4cGtv_M1jEkWwgO3nKFQNipOIURTv0sfgKtq6s8Ibnut_gVm9AdI_FnWoEKRlQcHrAcSjmT02aAx_BkeRfTZdeQGizqxT7tEFirfZZ-pKph9rQb2CZLrFnLbQVTlGjXDEVz4m6W8TSidAucuiTWVDkt0mtRz2QPODoBtw7Xo3_cdzrZtI5zLZpOMII96gQJw5couGtdVMDRNpZ45RJUh13g7RQlQptLDmynoNg3I8_1gTgXSqNay0FjkORasSIW6RNoyWTir4hFViQLgRho-1Uxd/37l/xUkiv8T5Th64AC3Y1lsGJA/h2/rnZiM395hIpakjvGTLlxHgTVIGz-RYkNa2c3tD9yrrU)**
Thank you,
Terry

name: Team Inslee
subject: The freeze starts TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Time is running out.
| Friend, The fundraising freeze starts tomorrow at midnight. We have to be bold to make real progress, and that's exactly what Jay is doing. Like Greta Thunberg says, the climate crisis is a moral outrage -- and it's up to each of us to do something about it. In Washington state, we _are_ doing something about it. We're leading the fight against the climate crisis, we're stepping up to support economic opportunities for all Washingtonians, and we're taking bold steps to stop the spread of COVID-19. **But while we're hard at work, our opponents continue to spin conspiracy theories, organize, and raise money to block our progress.[The freeze starts TOMORROW. Can you rush a donation right now? Chip in $5 or more to support our progress in Washington state before it's too late!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=3&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14003?t=4&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)

---
Thanks,
Team Inslee
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=10&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
\--- Original Message ---
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Tue, Dec 8, 2020
Subject: The freeze is coming
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=11&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
Friend,
The freeze is coming -- that's why I wanted to reach out right now.
Friday is the last day to make sure we have the resources needed to get through the upcoming legislative session. Friday at midnight all donations must stop for at least 90 days. It's the last time you'll get a fundraising email from me for the next three months, and we have huge plans to combat climate change, create more economic opportunity, and respond to the COVID-19 crisis in Washington state while Washington, D.C. continues to stall.
**Our opponents who want to organize against progress can still accept money hand-over-fist while legislators work hard in Olympia -- that's why I'm reaching out.[We have a pre-freeze goal of raising $30,000 by midnight on Friday: Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=12&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14003?t=13&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14004?t=14&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14005?t=15&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14006?t=16&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14007?t=17&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=18&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)
---
I'm so proud of the work we're doing here in Washington state: We're taking monumental steps to set the foundation for the next generation of progressive leaders and the future of the climate movement. And we're working day and night to keep folks safe from COVID-19 and to keep small businesses supported during this critical time.
While we had some big wins this election season (_thanks to you!_), we didn't secure the supermajority we needed to be assured we'd have the votes to execute on our big plans for Washington state. With the freeze coming, our opponents will use this time to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars to defeat the progress Washingtonians are depending on.
$30,000 will go a long way to supporting that work while we can't raise any contributions -- that's why I'm asking, right now:
**[Will you donate $5 or more before Friday's freeze deadline? I won't ask again for three months, and we can't fall short -- every dollar makes a difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=19&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/14002?t=20&akid=8227%2E868730%2EZdYJ_z)

subject: Will you become a founding donor to Terry’s campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwY-vBr1ulouVnXak69G_E_4Vs7pdyQVKXroTRYPp8W7MDaN99IX4BDd9ZFZgNopajVBg3FrgAVVdF7KsO5bUIEh71ze6sC7S0wkYM3gzjT2zK1UQjf0gJ-rQ3MbKbjg6VXq8JnVKqu6u6l_hIpKKsvC4C9fymnAyvSTlMZb4da_71cuPE3C3zK3E615RS6Ev_7KitlOLWd1phS1T2XycO08WU9tqAePohXI40WnuOQN-o7decx4E1PEF5RFQnBAHd1ZOtqOljG6il929BhkLkse8cUo62lNeYILosPMWNXljDrjmCDYqMPYypKgC4C_HBAPcqrLJt8j-Us2qF8muA9h/37l/oqHTIFWeT2G-YxeQbqXn5g/h0/kfpgkVm967jVDhAXE4K69Pj1UrsQ561nRrl9AmZOSkk)
Hi Derek, I wanted to take a minute to reach out to you about Terry. If you don't know my husband, I'd like to tell you a bit about him and why he's running for Governor. Terry always puts people first. He's never been afraid to do the right thing and fight for the big, progressive ideas that change people’s lives. Terry leads with his heart and, with so many struggling right now because of COVID-19, we need that leadership now more than ever. But here’s the thing. We may have fired Donald Trump in 2020, but Virginia Republicans are doing everything they can to keep Trumpism alive and well in the Commonwealth. In fact, the National Republican Governors Association has already made Virginia their number one target of 2021. **It's why I've talked with Terry's team about setting a goal to find 2,500 founding donors by the end of the day. clean_body: | | | Hi Derek, I wanted to take a minute to reach out to you about Terry. If you don't know my husband, I'd like to tell you a bit about him and why he's running for Governor. Terry always puts people first. He's never been afraid to do the right thing and fight for the big, progressive ideas that change people’s lives. Terry leads with his heart and, with so many struggling right now because of COVID-19, we need that leadership now more than ever. But here’s the thing. We may have fired Donald Trump in 2020, but Virginia Republicans are doing everything they can to keep Trumpism alive and well in the Commonwealth. In fact, the National Republican Governors Association has already made Virginia their number one target of 2021. It's why I've talked with Terry's team about setting a goal to find 2,500 founding donors by the end of the day. I'm really hoping I can count on you to be one of them who will help us start this campaign off strong so we can be ready for whatever happens next. **** | | | | | I’m so proud of Terry for continuing on this journey of public service and we'd be honored to have you join. name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: How the Treasury Department can fight the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
You can help.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r) Friend, The fossil fuel economy is one of the past. The future is clean energy. Realizing that future will require every federal agency, including the Treasury Department, to act. Remember: The climate crisis is also an economic one. The U.S. financial system funds fossil fuel corporations, and the Treasury Department has the unique power to disentangle our financial system from risky fossil fuel investments and to reinvest in good jobs in growing industries that build our clean energy economy. You can play a part in our new campaign to compel each agency in Biden's new administration to prioritize bold climate action. **[So we're asking you today: Will you donate to "adopt" the Treasury Department? Donate today to help us urge the next Treasury Secretary to use her power to build a just, inclusive clean energy future.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1287?t=3&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r)** | [💵 DONATE TO "ADOPT" THE TREASURY DEPARTMENT 💵 ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1287?t=4&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r)
---
As part of our Five to Mobilize campaign, Evergreen's policy team has identified five concrete steps that the Treasury Department can take to realize President-elect Biden's climate vision. Now, it's time to start a national conversation to urge the next Treasury Secretary, Janet Yellen, to take those steps.
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1287?t=5&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r)
Achieving good policy starts with getting the right people in charge. In nominating Yellen to lead the Treasury Department, President-elect Joe Biden has chosen a leader who understands the urgent need to mobilize the full power of the federal government to rescue our economy as well as our climate.
And to make sure we can spread this message far and wide, we need your help.
**["Adopt" the Treasury Department today to help us push these five action steps to the top of the next Treasury Secretary's agenda.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1287?t=6&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r)**
Thanks for all you do,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Founder, Evergreen Action
[DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1287?t=7&akid=5077%2E53494%2E9SGD4r)
---

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: Keep Socialism out of the Senate
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am the conservative businessman and donor who is fighting hard to save the U.S. Senate from being controlled by crazy Socialists- and right now, I need you to join me in that fight

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw
!

Did you SEE the debate in Georgia this week? The one where the Democrats took off their masks and revealed what unrepentant Socialists they really are?

Republican Kelly Loeffler held radical Socialist Warnock to account:

For Loeffler, that meant reciting her campaign ads nearly word-for-word: Referring constantly to her opponent as “radical liberal Raphael Warnock,” sometimes twice in the same sentence. Additionally, she kept pressing her attacks on Warnock calling police “gangsters and thugs” and a snippet from a Warnock sermon on how it is impossible to serve both God and the military.

Kelly really took it to radical Socialist Warnock:

Loeffler countered, saying, "I’m a Christian. I'm a person of deep faith. I don't need a lecture from someone who has used the bible to not only justify attacking our military... But he's also used the bible to justify abortion."

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Trust fund baby Jon Ossoff is no better!

"Only a trust fund socialist could spend his early 30s trying to run for office with zero real-life accomplishments," said Jesse Hunt, the communications director for the National Republican Senatorial Committee. "This all began with Ossoff losing a high-profile race after D.C. Democrats and California liberals flooded the state in support of his candidacy, and that's exactly how this will end."

Make no mistake, Georgians don't want these guys! All their money comes from California and New York limousine liberals.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

This is a case of the extreme Left trying to buy two U.S. Senate seats in the deep South- and take out two excellent Republican senators.

That way, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer get to tell senile Joe Biden what to do- and have their radical agenda pass!

These people are really dangerous! Take a look at what Warnock and Ossoff have promised:

-Defunding the police.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-"Repenting for whiteness" (Warnock's words, not mine).

-AOC's Green New Deal.

IF THIS ISN'T WHAT YOU WANT, I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN THESE TWO SEATS!!!

California and New York want these seats for the liberals. Let's beat them!.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is stepping up to make sure the Socialists don't control the Senate! That's what we do- we elect America-First Conservatives.

In January, control of the U.S. Senate is on the line. Help us make sure the Good Guys have control!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Time is running out. We can make a difference here- but only with your help!

We want pro-gun, pro-life, pro-Trump Senators to win, but we MUST win two of two races there. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw
- Georgia is not Socialist!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. They need us! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Christopher Ekstrom

Businessman

America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=hVmxgPJL2rcqI4c&b=sVHpdXz80UMI2Es.YmeBRw
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

subject: What a day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOTfXcvi07aZ0wo2tqb0aJJRLfhWFb6eGd71zqeBMSN9Zlk26qKY8LWjm_IpE-3jevR3oVfiRwdvFDfEHi_6YJ2aMeSx3rlugwp3yeXLNXZokMnHA_EwI6rtzgmqbhBCenFD-XPJRym-xUoCsyNDSy3gAfZTyfCdXaiQPq9gQey-rp7zM6cslOeeOuAEI_ssXbQv4wc3RCJPLb2f0l3T20bbxd41k3v7qFLeInvr-2kTj/37l/jLCfkmCRTz6ZAynRsYQjmA/h0/u1BluK-kJ5s7P8JkS5jIBWVJKD6hCe8Bu5WBYx5H0Xc)
Derek, last night I went to bed grinning from ear-to-ear. As of right now, over 2,500 grassroots supporters have stepped up and become founding donors to our campaign. It’s an incredible start, but I think we can do even better. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Protect your household
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
The data shows that our two-week pause is starting to work - mobility is decreasing, and there are early signs that percent positive is turning around. But cases are still too high, and if we lift the pause now, we risk negating the impacts that we know will result from sustained decreases in mobility.
That's why today I announced that we are extending the pause one more week, to Sunday, December 20. You can watch the [six-minute video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4OHtkeSGAfZMP7n-YPlRvq1XSDR2ziRgGrVbrs6K_INTi7S5WugXv3q1hwZI08jMOAkY3WWyfgXMTpjjnrdg-gQPTYXZM76FJw==&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==) below for a brief description of what we're doing and why.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4OHtkeSGAfZMP7n-YPlRvq1XSDR2ziRgGrVbrs6K_INTi7S5WugXv3q1hwZI08jMOAkY3WWyfgXMTpjjnrdg-gQPTYXZM76FJw==&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==)
---
| You can watch the full video of the press conference [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4OHtkeSGAfZMNLi15inOnD8zmcVrOrIcgSHnF6su1TtunLI8f2_HWCxG5Lsuh83NW6iO8626AEWi1C48rWyquUxwOeWWUPcQAbX4jA-xfO2xNVwEQ70Hzb8EnXXO-tUhwZ2dokwhbVFmI8SEeaBAZ4Y=&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==).
---
| I know that this is going to be difficult. That's why we're extending further financial aid for those affected:

* For families, we're extending the additional $200 weekly unemployment benefit to cover the third week of the pause. You don't need to do anything to claim this benefit. Any Rhode Islander who certifies for unemployment for the week of December 13 will automatically get the additional $200.

* For businesses, we're extending the deadline to apply for financial relief until midnight on Monday, December 14. If you're qualified and in an industry impacted by the pause, and you apply by Monday night, you'll get a check. It's a very simple application - just go to [tax.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4OHtkeSGAfZMYXoayBjGhikxTCf8ALIHxUfMwYrzouM4oWsfE6mZx7sB36HotZMrWljPpcszJYHb_Ywqaqy0IyE=&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==) and check off a few boxes. Additionally, every business that receives relief through that program will automatically get a second check for half the amount of the first, to provide relief for the one-week extension.

---
|
---
| After the end of the pause, we aren't going to flip a switch and go back to where we were, or we'll end up back here in a few weeks. Instead, we're going to slowly relax some of the restrictions of the pause and measure their effect on our cases. You can see in the graphic above what restrictions will be changed after the pause, starting on December 21.
If we continue staying home as much as possible for one more week - if we all think about ways we can limit our mobility in our own lives for a little bit longer - it will make the impact we need to slow the spread of COVID-19. The most important thing you can do right now is to protect your family by following the guidance and staying away from social gatherings for just a little bit longer.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4OHtkeSGAfZMdvu90yI42NHBjL0uyDt9BgNGH4Ne3y97I4PWFHj1nx568LL4YbTis2o6yKWW2r6XDIt_wNHmMjqTDEtYjtuEvreE7VJVrTQPPywMT-378uENu00X7OzBafDqXZHb87SQwDaNipcclE8_hfCy746EurS9fNCIzKCWTjUDL6gBvRfDwu_qHCMLIsIPhk8TD_qRm3ublNbwcas7l2ZELqFrHj3Y6SSZt3xYgV60byfaj_ZwH1uV8AWdIi25cpqFpGd2LJPC4CwpZMw=&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zgjS0JtkhsIXpveTWY3V1ynERhfLYfzXd5-bFpAVIH390kVQen4C4NbRq7oVtTdUNBUQ623gmPEtuaBLGXWB8Hj0NF5GGXe5xs43KUbFps1dVGAmfDhrH5rpYyAigEXV2ercwFU0OYqs09rmgBiYK0Z3LmkanaxvhxBVabRDW3saVhv9BzJ5hFK4Qz5BTfjlOFoIWBYw2vk=&c=KvChFWiy-E_bKI29cT9TLCmtwkS-2rrkWj1i3pNqeDQNIvXeKmXouA==&ch=1J1QLATTHzFMgx79VPjsFiNY3kYAPRCYP6Ptg8U0A79z_LyIhfo_Fw==)
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

---

Sent by [audrey.lucas@governor.ri.gov](mailto:audrey.lucas@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: Senators Loeffler, Perdue Join Georgia Republicans to Improve Reliability and Transparency of Signature Verification Process Ahead of Senate Runoff Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 10, 2020
Senators Loeffler, Perdue Join Georgia Republicans to Improve Reliability and Transparency of Signature Verification Process Ahead of Senate Runoff Elections
Lawsuit follows county-by-county analysis revealing the signature matching process is resulting in the counting of thousands of votes unequally across Georgia
ATLANTA - In an effort to increase the integrity of the elections process ahead of the upcoming runoff for both U.S. Senate seats in Georgia, Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue joined the Georgia Republican Party and the National Republican Senatorial Committee in a federal lawsuit today to improve the reliability and transparency of the signature verification process. The suit seeks to reaffirm these simple, non-partisan principles: every lawful vote cast should be counted, any illegal vote submitted cannot be counted, and there must be full transparency and uniformity in the counting process. This requested relief is necessary before the state begins processing absentee ballots on December 21, after which violations of the signature match verification process will be impossible to remedy.
Senator Kelly Loeffler (R-Ga) and Senator David Perdue (R-Ga) issued the following statement:
"Georgia's Senate elections will determine the future direction of our country -- everyone should have total confidence in its outcomes. That starts with making meaningful improvements to the reliability and transparency of the signature verification process. We need to do it now, before votes are processed. No American should ever have to question the integrity and credibility of our elections system. These are reasonable and actionable steps we can take immediately to further ensure the integrity and accuracy of our January 5 elections."
The case papers filed today state: "Georgia election officials, from the state level to the local level, have undertaken significant efforts to assure the integrity of the Georgia election process in the runoff. Those efforts should be commended, and this lawsuit is brought to augment and further improve them." Additional safeguards in the signature match verification process, such as equaling the standard for which an absentee ballot is accepted with that of one that is rejected, are necessary to ensure that the increased use of absentee voting in Georgia in this election cycle are adequately verified.
This lawsuit provides a county-by-county analysis of Georgia's signature matching rejection rates, during the November 2020 election, which reveals conclusively that the existing process is resulting in the counting of thousands of votes unequally across the state - many without any signature matching review whatsoever. Key empirical findings from the November 2020 election include:

* Of Georgia's 159 counties, 100 did not reject a single absentee ballot because of a signature mismatch.

* The data revealed significant differences in rejection rates across counties, indicating that the signature matching process is being applied unequally across the state.

* In contrast to the 100 counties that did not reject a single ballot for a mismatched signature, the rejection rate in Taylor County (2.09%) was more than forty times higher than the statewide rejection rate. Likewise, the rejection rate in Clay County (1.20%) was more than twenty times higher than the statewide rate.

* The vast disparity in rejection rates cannot be explained by population size. For instance, Georgia's least populous county, Taliaferro County, had the third highest rejection rate of 0.65%, while Georgia's second least populous county, Quitman County, rejected zero ballots.

* The disparity also cannot be explained based on a county's geographic location: Of the ten contiguous counties comprising the Atlanta region, two counties (Douglas and Rockdale) rejected zero ballots for mismatched signatures, while three others (Fayette, Gwinnett, and Henry) had rejection rates far exceeding the statewide average.

* Georgia's recently low signature rejection rate is dramatically lower than signature rejection rates from other states. For example, Nevada's rejection rate for mismatched signatures in the 2020 general election was 0.42% -- more than eight times higher than Georgia's rejection rate.

* No known statistical analysis supports the county-by-county rejection rates for mismatched signatures. To the contrary, the analysis establishes that the likelihood of obtaining the rejection rates as reported by ten of the counties (Cherokee, Cobb, DeKalb, Fulton, Dougherty, Gwinnett, Henry, Liberty, and Taylor) is practically zero, with a statistical likelihood of less than 0.01%.

The Plaintiffs seek these vitally needed improvements to the signature verification process to improve the reliability of absentee voting for all Georgians.
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fI-UF4cexU5lM4seOlpTftPfxa_DeWZE6A5tEiC9twyRiQrbjOO8Bhz3II1czQAx7Q-OT49JtjFjsBzQzQoLvloF8i9ccmdk55B1JdfsAsVzlwpfz_ChoxNA6oMuW7Np-hgdOt8p04L1oAdj2FJBoIaRH2K7Sgdu&c=gmzsSBQwkpsHQxsZQRFckuYQob13LJBdJhnAV5lTzSqLqmqk30oqJg==&ch=10ndZHBAoaHeDACWyfgc5xkds2u1QOLYyJ6m-8IICaU4hbcMNcvOTg==)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
